paragraphs: Good momentum — overdue count is down to 199. This is above the 7-day average of 172 — the trend is heading the wrong direction. 39 tasks are actively in progress — that's solid execution across the board. 2 tasks should be active but are stuck waiting on blockers — these need immediate attention.

**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** The oldest overdue task is 9 days past due with 50 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **37 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.

**Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199):** The oldest overdue task is 16 days past due with 47 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **35 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $17,260 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** The oldest overdue task is 49 days past due with 39 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **24 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $32,311 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Ginger Brown:** The oldest overdue task is 37 days past due with 31 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **8 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $36,824 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** The oldest overdue task is 16 days past due with 8 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **63 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $18,153 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** Down to 4 overdue — making progress. Keep pushing to close them out today. **34 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $11,029 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.
**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** **14 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $44,883 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.
**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** **16 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 7 payment tasks due this week.

315 tasks starting in the next 7 days. **271 of those have nobody assigned** — these need a name on them before they're due or they'll become overdue with no accountability. 36 overdue payments are holding up the pipeline — every day these sit, the schedule slips further. **$110,227 in payments going out this week** across 58 tasks — make sure funds are available. $95,555 expected in from 7 client payments. Heavy week ahead for Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458) and Kyle Aubry - Project 01 — make sure resources are lined up.

Angel Pacheco: Angel Pacheco is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 1. Keep the momentum going.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** 8 overdue (oldest: 16d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **63 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 77 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** Clean — 3 tasks in progress. **14 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 17 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** Clean — 1 tasks in progress. **16 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 24 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
Jeff: Jeff is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 3. Keep the momentum going.

**Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199):** 47 overdue (oldest: 16d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **35 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 35 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** 39 overdue (oldest: 49d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. 1 task blocked by payments — escalate, not on you. **24 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 27 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Knock out the 3 overdue today — each one risks cascading into blocked tasks downstream.
Milagros Porturas: Milagros Porturas is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 16. Keep the momentum going.

**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** 50 overdue (oldest: 9d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **37 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 37 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Ginger Brown:** 31 overdue (oldest: 37d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **8 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 12 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** Down to 4 overdue — good. Close them out today. **34 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 46 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
